risk_list.logic: ULTRA bearish -7.61% with 3.9x volume spike, breakdown and major move. Healthcare sector showing weakness. Avoid counter-trend positions in panic volatile regime.
ULTRA bearish -7.38% with 11.6x volume spike, breakdown, major move in Hotels/Travel. Sector showing structural weakness. High-impact scored signal with 0.94 confidence on downside.
Government alert: Excise duty cut hits revenues by ₹1 lakh crore, directly negative for oil marketing companies. Policy headwind with 6/10 impact score affecting BPCL, IOC, HPCL.
Same excise duty revenue hit as BPCL. Additionally, crude oil falling -4.07% on Iran deal hopes compresses refining margins. Multiple contradictory signals create uncertainty.
Triple negative: excise duty revenue loss, falling crude margins, government policy uncertainty. Avoid oil PSUs in current environment per government intelligence.
Crude oil crash -4.07% on U.S.-Iran negotiations directly impacts upstream oil producer valuations. Government alert flags ONGC specifically in excise duty impact list.
Headline: Rs 45 crore interest payment allegation creates uncertainty. Stock down -2% on internal probe reports. Avoid large-cap banking during investigation news cycle.
Shares crashed -8% in 2 days with PL Capital seeing 36% downside potential per headline. Momentum breakdown in progress. Avoid falling knives in panic volatile regime.
Contradictory scanner signal: marked ULTRA bearish despite +1.07% move (anomaly). Confusion in signal quality suggests avoiding until clarity emerges.
Scanner directional split flags INDOCO in SHORT category alongside POLYMED and EASEMYTRIP weakness. Healthcare sector rotation turning negative. Avoid sector underperformers.

intelligence.executive_summary: Indian markets trade in panic volatile regime with contradictory signals. Excise duty cut on fuel creates revenue concerns (-₹1 lakh crore) while strong sectoral rotation emerges in Power, Adani Group, and Media with exceptional volume spikes. Global headwinds from inflation risks and AI-driven layoffs persist, but falling crude oil (Iran deal hopes) provides relief. Scanner anomalies show extreme divergence with 7 ultra-bullish vs 2 ultra-bearish signals.

government_impact.summary: FM Sitharaman's petrol/diesel excise duty cut creates ₹1 lakh crore revenue hit, negative for oil PSUs (BPCL, IOC, HPCL) but positive for consumption sectors. RBI Governor's rupee undervaluation comments signal potential policy support. Australian inflation miss eases global rate concerns. Net impact: moderately bearish on oil PSUs, neutral on broader market.
